# Random US Address Generator

A free online tool that generates random but realistic US addresses for software testing, form validation, demo data, and educational purposes.

## Site Structure

- / - Homepage with random address generator, sample addresses, tool cards, FAQ
- /random-address-generator/ - Complete address generator (street, city, state, ZIP, phone, email)
- /test-address-generator/ - Test-focused address generation
- /street-address-generator/ - Street address generator
- /random-person-generator/ - Complete person profiles with all fields
- /name-generator/ - Random first and last name combinations
- /email-generator/ - Random email addresses
- /username-generator/ - Random usernames
- /company-name-generator/ - Random company names
- /phone-number-generator/ - Random phone numbers
- /random-state-generator/ - Random US state picker
- /random-city-generator/ - Random US city picker
- /us-address/ - US address format reference
- /states/ - Directory of all 50 states with address generation
- /cities/ - City-level address generation
- /zip-codes/ - ZIP code directory
- /blog/ - Articles about address generation, testing, and US geography
- /about/ - About the site
- /contact/ - Contact information
- /privacy-policy/ - Privacy policy
- /terms/ - Terms of service
- /all-tools/ - Complete tools directory

## Key Pages

Each city and state page has a dedicated address generator filtered to that location.
Blog articles provide educational content about US addresses, ZIP codes, area codes, and test data generation.

## Technology

Built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, deployed on Cloudflare Pages.
